Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Timaias Adama]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin took Adama's Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Adama gave his life for Yerin.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Timaias Adama has been a guest of the Heaven’s Glory School for almost three months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Timaias Adama is a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Timaias Adama possesses soulfire-infused flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Timaias Adama uses a wintersteel blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Adama is the Sword Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Adama has a void space filled with ancient research notes and experimental materials.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Adama has an Archlord body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Adama has a Steelborn Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Adama is the Sage of the Endless Sword and uses the title of the Sword Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin asks if her fighting style came from Adama's Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin is destined to be Adama�s true successor if she reaches Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Adama would not have allowed Yerin's Blood Shadow to develop to its current point.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
